![](https://i0.wp.com/14roc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/14ROC-LOGO.png?ssl=1)

### IN THE HEART OF THE

### ARTS & ENTERTAINMENT DISTRICT

[![](https://14roc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Down_arrow.png)](https://14roc.com/#video-section)

![](https://14roc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/exterior-rendering-2.jpg)

### WELCOME TO 14 ROC, WHERE EVERY DAY IS AN OPPORTUNITY FOR DISCOVERY​.

At 14 ROC, innovative architecture meets urban connectivity in the heart of Downtown Miami. Thoughtfully designed residences rise from an organic rock-like form at the tower’s base, creating a structure that’s also a work of art.

Offering more than a new home, 14 ROC invites you to experience Miami in a whole new way with wellness amenities, calming finishes, indoor-outdoor living, and forward-looking urban integration.

### 31 STORIES

## 283 EXCLUSIVE RESIDENCES

## STUDIO, 1-, AND 2-BEDROOM RESIDENCES

![](https://14roc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/14_roc_dropoff_V5-ArtistConcept.jpg)

![](https://14roc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/View_01___Aerial_Looking_West0-ArtistConcept.jpg)

### IN THE HEART OF THE

### ARTS & ENTERTAINMENT DISTRICT

Miami is experiencing a bold transformation, and 14 ROC places you right in the center of it all in the expanding Arts & Entertainment District. With the creation of the new Signature Bridge, Miami’s skyline and streetscape are being reimagined, with the added feature of the Underdeck, 33 acres of green space, parks, recreation, and more. Just steps away from these future-forward developments, 14 ROC offers direct access to Bayfront Park, the scenic Baywalk, and world-renowned destinations like Pérez Art Museum Miami, Adrienne Arsht Performing Arts Center, and Miami Worldcenter, one of the largest urban developments in the US, bringing in high-end shopping, fine dining, and entertainment. With major companies choosing Miami as their new home, a booming sports scene, and renowned arts and entertainment hubs, Miami has cemented its place as one of the hottest cities to live and invest in.

[Explore Location](https://14roc.com/neighborhood/)

![](https://14roc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/14_roc_pool_2-ArtistConcept-scaled.jpg)

### At 14 ROC, opportunity

### meets lifestyle in the city’s

### most exciting new district.

![](https://14roc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/14_roc_Unit_Livingroom_2_Final-ArtistConcept.jpg)GREAT ROOM

### Fully finished & furnished

### residences By the renowned

### March and White Design TEAM.

![](https://14roc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/14_roc_Unit_Livingroom__Final_1_Rev-ArtistConcept.jpg)Living Area

![](https://14roc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/114_roc_Unit_2_den_A_Final-ArtistConcept.jpg)Office / Guest bed

At 14 ROC, choose from an exclusive selection of 283 meticulously crafted studio, 1-bedroom, and 2-bedroom residences in this 31-story boutique building packed with integrated indoor and outdoor amenities and topped off by a glittering rooftop pool. Every home features 10-foot ceilings, expansive balconies with floor-to-ceiling sliding glass doors, and premium appliances and finishes. The building’s interior design by MAWD seamlessly blends richly layered interiors with site-specific wellness-inspired design to create an oasis of calm, comfort, and elegance. Advanced smart home technology offers effortless control over your environment, seamlessly blending form and function to perfectly suit the needs of modern city dwellers.

[Explore Residences](https://14roc.com/residences/)

### Live, work, and play

### in effortless harmony.

14 ROC is designed to adapt to the rhythm of the city while offering a retreat into your own personal haven and is made for those who embrace spontaneity and seek the balance of work and leisure. With coworking lounges, high-speed connectivity, and outdoor spaces designed for relaxation and inspiration, every detail is crafted to enhance your urban experience. Whether you’re an entrepreneur, a digital nomad, or simply someone who craves the energy of a dynamic city, 14 ROC empowers you to live your best life every day.

[Explore Amenities](https://14roc.com/amenities/)

# 14 Roc Miami

### **Downtown Miami / 2028**

32 Stories / 283 Residences of
Studios, 1 & 2 Bedrooms

**125 NE 14th Street, Miami FL 33132, USA**

Average Price: $1,200 x SF ($12,917 x M2)

14 Roc Downtown is a new Residential Tower in the Signature District, featuring Condos from Studios to 2 bedroom configurations allowing short term rentals and Airbnb. The architectural design of 14 ROC features a distinctive, rock-like base that ascends into the sky, showcasing interiors by the renowned March and White Design, where art and structure seamlessly merge.

This project is currently in pre - construction and prices start at $509,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/14rocmiami/#contactform) for more information.

CONDOS FOR SALE

CONDOS FOR RENT

CONDOS SOLD/RENTED

FLOOR PLANS

Architect/s: RSP Architects

Developed by GFO Investments

Website: [https://14RocDowntown.miami/](https://14rocdowntown.miami/)

This project is currently in pre - construction and prices start at $509,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/14rocmiami/#contactform) for more information.

**Price Range**

Studios from $509,000

1 Bedrooms from $651,000

2 Bedrooms from $973,000

**Payment Plan**

20% Contract

10% Groundbreaking

10% 15th floor

10% Top off

50% Closing Q2/2028



## Features

### Building Features

- Approved for short-term rentals, granting flexibility and possibilities
- Double-height lobby with floor-to-ceiling windows
- 24-hour reception
- 24-hour building security
- Advanced smart building technology offers high-speed fiber-optic wireless internet access throughout common areas and residences
- High-speed passenger elevators
- 25,000 square feet of building amenities are distributed on two building floors and the roof
- Rooftop pool with views of Biscayne Bay and the Miami skyline
- Bar and grill amenities on 5th floor deck
- Co-working lounge
- Private meeting and event rooms
- State-of-the-art fitness center and private workout studios
- Yoga lounge with terrace
- Locker rooms featuring steam room, sauna, and experience shower
- Karaoke room
- Table games and poker room
- Theater room
- Residents entertainment lounge with open kitchen
- Kids room

### Residence Features

- 283 urban luxury residences with modern, open layouts from 417 to 951 sq. ft.
- Offering a selection of studio, 1-, and 2-bedroom residences
- All residences are delivered fully finished and furnished with fixtures and furniture curated by MAWD \| March and White Design
- Private balconies accessible from living rooms or primary bedrooms
- High 10’ ceilings in all units
- Floor-to-ceiling sliding glass doors and sound attenuating, impact-resistant laminated glass throughout
- Advanced technology smart building wiring for HD TV, multiple telephone/data lines and ultra-high-speed internet access
- Individually controlled energy-efficient central air conditioning and heating system
- Imported European-style kitchen cabinets with premium hardware and drawer pulls
- Monogram premium-grade appliances including refrigerator, oven, cooktop, microwave, and panelled dishwasher
- Elegant imported stone countertops
- Contemporary stainless steel under-mounted sink
- Gourmet faucet with integral sprayer
- Imported European-style bathroom cabinets with premium hardware and drawer pulls
- Elegant imported stone countertops and backsplashes
- Porcelain sinks with dual faucets in select residences
- Custom-finished floors and walls in wet areas
- Frameless glass shower enclosures
- Spacious, deep soaking tubs

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/04-14Roc-Building-Design.jpg)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/05/Developer-GFO.jpg)

GFO Investments is a real estate development firm. Their team is committed to fiscal discipline and achievement, evident by over 40 years of business excellence. Another one of their prestigious investments is Eighty Seven Park.
